# YOUR CODE HERE
N, Q = map(int, input().split())
treatments = list(map(int, input().split()))

# Initialize a list to represent the presence of teeth in each hole
teeth = [True] * (N + 1)  # Using 1-based indexing

for t in treatments:
    teeth[t] = not teeth[t]

# Count the number of True values (i.e., teeth present)
print(sum(teeth[1:]))
